item.title: Future Projects will be here
item.description: This will be a space for me to post any future work in a “blog” style form!

item.title: experience
item.description: Experience As mentioned previously, I have finished my multimedia degree. Until now I have had the opportunity to work with these softwares. Adobe Premiere DaVinci Resolve Sony Vegas Adobe Illustrator Adobe Photoshop Adobe Lightroom Adobe XD Figma FL Studio Ableton Live Audacity Blender I have an interest in everything that my degree has to offer (all the types of digital media), although I have a great interest in the area of sound design/ editing, and in the area of video editing.

item.title: portfolio
item.description: Portfolio To see everything I have been doing in my degree, and with my free time Behance SoundCloud Youtube
